client_config.pricing_policy: Do not quote specific prices. Say that pricing depends on the job scope and that the owner will provide a quote after a site visit or phone call.

tone.length: Keep replies concise — two to three short paragraphs maximum

exclusions: Never quote fixed prices without owner approval
Never commit to availability or timescales
Never discuss non-domestic or commercial work

lead.name: Jane Smith
lead.message: Hi, I need a landlord electrical certificate for my rental property in Beeston. When are you available and roughly how much does it cost?
